_comment: Show & Tell data manifest. Update this file before each run. Everything in the PDF that changes version-to-version lives here.

architecture.pipeline_description: Data Sources (19 sources) → Ingest (EventBridge + 30 Lambdas + API Gateway + SQS DLQs) → Storage (DynamoDB + S3) → Compute (nightly Lambdas) → Delivery (SES + CloudFront + MCP)

incidents.resiliency_subtitle: DLQs · alarms · gap-aware backfill · 3 incidents resolved <1hr each

resolved_examples.title: Secrets consolidation
resolved_examples.detail: stale SECRET_NAME env var on 2 Lambdas — CloudWatch surfaced immediately, env var patched

resolved_examples.title: CloudFront double-pathing
resolved_examples.detail: origin path '/dashboard' caused 403 on avatar assets — URL path analysis resolved in <20 min

resolved_examples.title: Handler filename mismatch
resolved_examples.detail: Weekly Digest used wrong zip entry — CloudWatch import error on first invocation, corrected in one redeploy

roadmap_near_term.detail: Financial data as health input: spend, savings rate, net worth alongside health scores
User-defined rewards triggered by Character Sheet milestones — weekend away, spa day, new gear, dinner out, concert tickets
iOS Shortcut → voice check-in → Lambda → Claude → structured journal entry
Demand-side context: meeting load, travel days, and schedule density as health inputs
If Anthropic API is unavailable, a router Lambda retries with OpenAI GPT-4o as fallback — keeps all 9 weekly emails firing even during outages

board_personas: Dr. Lisa Park (sleep), Dr. Sarah Chen (training), Dr. Marcus Webb (nutrition), Dr. Peter Attia (metabolic), Coach Rodriguez (behavioral), Dr. Paul Conti (psychiatry), Dr. Vivek Murthy (social), Elena Voss (narrator)
